when_to_use: Real-world AR mapping and semantic segmentation SDK
Multiplayer location-based AR games with shared world data

pros: Real-world AR mapping from Pokemon Go backend
Multiplayer AR APIs work at scale
Mature toolset from actual shipping game
cons: Niantic has been trimming platform investments
Competes against native ARKit and ARCore
Consumer AR market hasnt broken out
review.verdict: Rich AR SDK born from Pokemon Go, but platform future looks uncertain post-layoffs.
review.best_for: Unity teams building persistent multiplayer AR experiences
review.not_for: Teams that need long-term SDK stability guarantees
